name: Chocolate Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan or double boiler, melt 6 oz white chocolate and the chocolate chips.
2. Stir in peanuts, marshmallows, and cereal.
3. Pour the mixture onto a greased 10-inch pizza pan or a 10-inch circle of cardboard covered with foil.
4. Spread to an even top.
5. Sprinkle with coconut.
6. Top with cherries.
7. Melt the remaining white chocolate.
8. Drizzle over the pizza.
9. Chill.
Yield: 16-20 servings.
